project_context.core_products: PVC Decor Film for Membrane Doors, PVC Laminates 1mm & 3mm

scaling.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tight font-extrabold text-slate-900
scaling.overline: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-orange-600 mb-4 block

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Industrial precision. Sharp edges, heavy bento-grids, stark contrast between text and background. No soft shadows; use 1px solid borders for definition.
spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 lg:gap-8
spacing_and_layout.card_structure: border border-slate-200 bg-white p-8 lg:p-12 shadow-[0_4px_20px_-4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]

buttons.primary: bg-orange-600 text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-slate-800 hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-200
buttons.outline: border-2 border-slate-900 text-slate-900 bg-transparent rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white transition-all duration-200

components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn components. Sharp corners (rounded-none). Inputs should have border-slate-300, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-600 focus:border-transparent.
components_strategy.tables: Industrial data tables. Deep slate header background, white text. Row backgrounds alternate white and slate-50. Solid 1px borders.
components_strategy.badges: Square, uppercase, tight tracking, bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1

hero.description: Industrial machinery, factory floor, vacuum press

page_sections_flow: 1. Header: Sticky nav, KDIPL Logo, Nav Links (Products, Distributor, Importers), 'Request Sample' CTA, WhatsApp floating widget.

2. Hero: Headline '23+ Years of Manufacturing Excellence'. Subheadline 'Premium PVC Decor Film & Laminates. Made in India.' Two Buttons: 'View Catalog' & 'Become a Distributor'. Dark overlay (bg-slate-900/60) on factory background.
3. Products Showcase (Bento Grid): Split into 'PVC Decor Film (Vacuum Press)' and 'PVC Laminates (1mm/3mm)'. Show textures and end-use doors.
4. For Distributors (Priority 1): Focus on territory lock-in, high ROI margins, and supply consistency. Lead to Distributor Application form.
5. For Importers (Priority 2): 'Stop Importing. Buy Direct from India.' Side-by-side Comparison Table (KDIPL vs Importers) comparing Lead Time, MOQ, Customization, Support. Shipping container visual.
6. For Manufacturers (Priority 3): Focus on consistent quality for furniture/doors.
7. Texture Catalog: Grid of 8-12 cards showing Wood, Marble, Solid textures. Hover effects. Big CTA to 'Download Full PDF Catalog'.
8. Manufacturing & Trust: Process timeline (Vacuum Press -> QC). Stat counters: 23+ Years, Pan-India Network, ISO capacity placeholders.
9. Lead Capture Mega-Section: Shadcn Tabs switching between 'Request Sample', 'Get Quote', and 'Distributor Application'. Each form posts to DB and triggers email logic.
10. Footer: Contact (WhatsApp: +91 93113 42988, Email: sales@kdipl.in), Addresses, Quick Links.

admin_panel_requirements.login: Simple password protected login route at /admin.
admin_panel_requirements.dashboard_layout: Sidebar nav, main content area. Strict industrial SaaS look. Dashboard metric cards for total leads.
admin_panel_requirements.data_table: Shadcn Data Table for Leads. Columns: Date, Type (Sample/Quote/Distributor), Name, Company, Email, Phone, Status (New, Contacted, Closed).
admin_panel_requirements.actions: Ability to view lead details, update status, search by name/phone, and export to CSV.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Ensure you install `lucide-react` for icons and standard Shadcn components (button, input, select, tabs, table, dialog).
FONTS: Import 'Cabinet Grotesk' from Fontshare or Google Fonts (or use a close alternative like 'Outfit' or 'Space Grotesk' but make it sharp) and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body.
AESTHETIC: Do not use gradients. Use solid colors. Make the website feel heavy, reliable, and engineered. Square corners (rounded-none) are preferred for the brutalist industrial look.
LAYOUT: Use pure HTML/Tailwind grids for the marketing sections. Use Shadcn strictly for interactive elements like Forms, Tabs (for the multi-lead capture), and the Admin Data Table.
DATA ATTRIBUTES: Add `data-testid` to all forms, buttons, and admin actions.
BACKEND: Create necessary FastAPI endpoints for `/api/leads` (POST for new lead, GET for admin), and implement a simple email notification mock or integration.
IMAGES: strictly use the URLs provided in the media section. Do not use placehold.it or dummy images.
